overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the neon-lit streets of Night City at night. The scene features wet pavement reflecting colorful holographic billboards, elevated highway overpasses, and futuristic vehicles driving past.

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a blue jacket while walking under the elevated highway overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead of ego, leading the way

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support pillars
large glowing advertisements and holographic displays on building facades
reflective wet pavement showing neon reflections

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in a futuristic city. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the glow of neon billboards on the right. The camera follows a pedestrian in a blue jacket while futuristic cars pass on the left.

events.description: exits covered area under overpass into open intersection
crossing the multi-lane street at intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: turning left and crossing the intersection with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black van driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large billboard displaying 'EL GUAPO' with a weapon advertisement
marked pedestrian crossing with yellow grid lines
building with large guitar-shaped signage and steakhouse branding

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into a wide-open intersection. The camera turns left and crosses the street, passing the large 'El Guapo' billboard on the left. A futuristic van drives through the intersection as pedestrians cross together.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with prominent steakhouse landmark

events.description: crossing another street intersection near the guitar statue

agents.ego_description: walking past groups of pedestrians waiting at the corner and crossing the street

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing at the corner waiting to cross

segments.scene_description: Approaching and passing the distinctive guitar statue building with its large neon signage. The camera crosses another intersection while pedestrians wait at the corners. The wet streets continue to reflect the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: Kabuki district commercial walkway with dense signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians and neon signs

entered.detail: vertical neon sign displaying 'KABUKI' in red letters
illuminated sign for foodcourt above storefronts
the same highway structure visible again in the distance ahead
large billboard with 'AVANT GARDE' text and imagery

segments.scene_description: Walking through the Kabuki district with dense neon signage including the prominent 'Kabuki' and 'Foodcourt' signs. The elevated highway overpass becomes visible again in the distance. Various pedestrians walk along the wet sidewalks reflecting the colorful lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched urban corridor that transitions from the shadow of an overpass into the vibrant heart of the Kabuki district. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, following a pedestrian in a blue jacket along wet concrete sidewalks that mirror the glow of nearby billboards. As the camera emerges from the overpass into a wide-open intersection, it turns left to cross the street past a large El Guapo sign while futuristic vans and pedestrians navigate the crossing. The scene then shifts toward a distinctive guitar-shaped building with bright neon signage, crossing another intersection where the rain-slicked pavement continues to reflect the city's lights. Finally, the camera moves deep into the Kabuki district, passing dense signage for the local foodcourt before the elevated highway reappears in the distance.
